sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC in (select Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Bonus Accrual' and ID = 'Skip CC')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,CC,Amt1,Flex1) (select KeyID,Co,GL,CC,round(sum(Amt1),2),'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co,GL,CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2',GL,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set CC = '1USH200002' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC = '5USH000006'
Update TransX set CC = '3LBH000002' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC = '3LBH000001'
Update x set x.CCdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join CCtrs y on x.CC = y.CCtr where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Amt1) (select KeyID,Co,'2510001' as GL,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co)
Update x set x.Crcy = y.Crcy, x.PC = (case when GL = '2510001' then y.DefaultPC else '' end) from TransX x inner join Companies y on x.Co = y.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set ProdCode = 'ACCRUAL', UWYR = '[Yr]' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Txt = 'Bonus Accrual for [Yr]-[Mo]', Flex1 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
